source_pr.title: planner: fix the issue that some PointGet plans generated in physical-stage cannot be cached
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #26868, close #26873

 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary: planner: fix the issue that some PointGet plans generated in physical-stage cannot be cached

### What is changed and how it works?

planner: fix the issue that some PointGet plans generated in physical-stage cannot be cached




### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

```release-note
planner: fix the issue that some PointGet plans generated in physical-stage cannot be cached
```

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select * from t2 order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1")) (planner/core/prepare_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select * from t2 order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1")) (planner/core/prepare_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. Exact plan/EXPLAIN assertions are brittle when optimizer choices can vary. This PR stabilizes it by: tk.MustQuery("select * from t2 order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1")) (planner/core/prepare_test.go).
fix_pattern: tk.MustQuery("select * from t2 order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1")) (planner/core/prepare_test.go)

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select * from t2 order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1")) (planner/core/prepare_test.go)

files: executor/explainfor_test.go, executor/prepared_test.go, executor/seqtest/prepared_serial_test.go, expression/expression.go, expression/expression_test.go, planner/core/find_best_task.go, planner/core/prepare_test.go, planner/core/stats.go, util/ranger/detacher.go
